name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT ServerSet, For, T
                %% Must be declared as e.g. {1,2,...,n}

    Majority     \\ Integer representing floor(|ServerSet|/2)+1

VARIABLES nextIndex, matchIndex
\* Each element is a record with fields:
\* - state : one of {"Follower","Candidate","Leader"}
\* - currT : natural number >= 0
\* - vFwd : either NONE or an identifier from ServerSet (the id that was granted a vote)
*)
TypeOK ==
    \A s \in ServerSet :
        LET st == [s |-> serverState[s]] IN
            /\ st.state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}  
            /\ st.currT \in Nat
            /\ (\E f \in ServerSet \/ st.vFwd = NONE)  

Next ==
    (* A follower may receive AppendEntries and stay the same *)   
    \E srv \in ServerSet :
          /\ serverState' = [serverState EXCEPT ![srv].currT = MAX(serverState![srv].currT + 1)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<nextIndex,matchIndex>> 

   \/ (* Candidate starts election by incrementing its currentTerm,
         resetting votes to none for all servers. *)
     \E cand \in ServerSet :
           LET oldSt == serverState[cand] 

           IN
             /\ serverState'[cand] =
                 [state -> "Candidate",
                  currT -> newCurr,
                  votedFor -> None]
             /\ nextIndex' = [i \in ServerSet |
                               IF i # cand THEN nextIndex[i]

             /\ matchIndex' = [j \in ServerSet |
                                IF j # cand THEN matchIndex[j]

             /\ UNCHANGED (ServerSet \\ {cand})   

   \/ (* Vote request: a candidate requests vote from another server.
        The receiving server grants if it hasn't yet granted in this term. *)
      \E src,cnt \in ServerSet :  
            LET reqVote ==
                /\\ cnt.state = "Follower"
                   /\ cnt.votedFor = NONE
                    /\ cnt.currT <= serverState[src].currT
              IN
            /\ serverState' = [serverState EXCEPT ![cnt].
                                   vFwd = CASE
                                      WHEN reqVote THEN src
                                      OTHERWISE cnt.vFwd END ,
                                   state = CASE
                                     WHEN reqVote AND cnt.currT < serverState[src].currT
                                         THEN ["Follower","Leader"]? 
                                    OTHERWISE cnt.state END ,   
               /* keep other fields unchanged */
           ]

   \/ (* Candidate becomes leader after majority votes received *)    
     \E cand \in ServerSet :
          LET st == serverState[cand] 
              votedCount == Cardinality({s | s \in ServerSet:
                                            serverState[s].vFwd = cand})
          IN
            /\ st.state = "Candidate"       
            /\ votedCount >= Majority           
            /\ serverState'[cand] =
                 [state -> "Leader",
                  currT -> st.currT,
                  votedFor -> None]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<nextIndex,matchIndex>> 

Init ==
    (\A srv \in ServerSet:  % initial all followers with term zero and no vote granted.
        serverState[srv] = [
             state -> "Follower",  
             currT -> 0,
             votedFor -> NONE])  

Spec == Init /\\ []Next

====
